selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: DAG order in theory/iDo — validate→analyze→…→approve before draft_email. «aprobar antes de draft_email». Approve precedes draft.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Tests críticos de capstones N2, E2E y controles de privacidad/seguridad
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: S26 closes CP-N2-C and prepares Level-2 regression (S14–S26) + CF-2; E2E, security, privacy controls. Not a single print or marking passed without tests.
Skeptic: SLO «0 envíos sin approve»; zero_send_without_approve. A send without approve is a critical incident (P0), not a minor warning.
Skeptic: E2E evidence sets fraud_labels = 0 — «debe ser 0: no auto-fraude». Automatic fraud labels must be zero; evidence only for humans.

retrospection.note: Knowledge limited to sequential packets through active section.
